arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: ‘GAME-CHANGING’ Jobe Bellingham bid launched
arts.sum: Chelsea have launched a transfer bid for Jobe Bellingham that is claimed could be decisive in the signing of the young Sunderland midfield star. There is no doubt that Jude Bellingham is the stronger of the brothers in terms of potential, but that’s not to say that Jobe cannot become an accomplished player at Premier League level, too.
